headline: Malaysia Intelligence Sharing With Five Eyes Under Scrutiny
context: Reports that Malaysia shares intelligence with Five Eyes network through back-channel arrangements sparked parliamentary debate in 2025.

cards.big: Malaysia intelligence sharing with Five Eyes under parliamentary scrutiny
cards.sub: Undisclosed arrangements reportedly cover maritime and counter-terrorism data

cards.big: Special Branch confirmed cooperation exists but declined to reveal scope
cards.sub: Intelligence committee gained oversight of sharing agreements for first time

cards.big: Opposition argued undisclosed sharing compromises Malaysian sovereignty
cards.sub: Government countered that intelligence cooperation is essential for national security

cards.big: Sharing reportedly includes South China Sea vessel tracking data
cards.sub: Arrangements pre-date formal oversight mechanisms now being established

cards.big: Intelligence sharing tests whether security cooperation requires transparency to maintain legitimacy
Five Eyes intelligence sharing under scrutiny. Partnership access must be weighed against sovereignty costs.
